pages.title: Love Ring
pages.text: Love Ring is a pair item. Keep it in your normal inventory; the effect is active only when both partners have it at the same time.
Health scaling by trust tick is direct: 1-2 = +1 heart, 3-4 = +2, 5-6 = +3, 7-8 = +4, 9 = +5. At high trust, this changes survivability in long fights.
Ring path is strongest for teams that value defensive stability over volatility. Extra health creates space to recover from routing mistakes and protect your partner during chaotic phases.
This path does not create flashy burst moments. It creates consistency, and consistency is usually what carries long AAFT runs through mistakes, bad pulls, and delayed regroup windows.
$(bold)Operational rule:$() keep both rings in inventory at all times. If one partner drops it or stores it away at the wrong moment, both lose shared scaling and wipe risk rises immediately.
